front.title: JSContact Profile for RESTful Provisioning Protocol (RPP)

abstract.t: This document defines a JSContact usage profile, conforming to the rules described in [I-D.ietf-calext-jscontact-profiles], for the RESTful Provisioning Protocol (RPP). The JSContact Profile for RPP specifies how the JSContact format defined in [RFC9982] can be used as a standardized representation of contact information within RPP operations, enabling interoperability and consistency across RPP implementations that manage contact data.
